warnings: PATTERN RECLASSIFIED (t4, 2026-07-08 taxonomy): t3 classified this view as 'section'. This detail has no rebar/steel spec (only roof sheet, fascia board, and flashing material callouts with dimensions) -- under the new taxonomy's explicit definition of 'section' as steel-spec/dimension detail, this does not qualify. It IS a genuine cross-section cut through the roof edge assembly, which fits 'side_profile' ('มุมมองที่ไม่ใช่ top view เน้นมุมมองด้านข้าง เช่น รูปด้าน/รูปตัดอาคาร'). Reclassified accordingly; element content unchanged from t3.
This is eave/fascia detail R1, referenced elsewhere as 'เชิงชาย 1 (R1)'.

The vertical circled letter 'B' at the bottom of this detail matches the main building gridline B per the master grid file -- but only ONE axis letter appears on this local detail box, so this sheet alone cannot confirm whether it is being used as a true structural gridline tie or just a local section-reference letter; treated as plausible-but-unconfirmed.

Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t3's หน้า14_eave_r1.json: matches on all material callouts and the 1.50 m overhang. The small vertical annotation text remained only partially legible on this independent read too, consistent with t3's low-confidence flag on that field.
